task_completion.description: The FZK-Haus residential model is visible in the Bonsai/BlenderBIM 3D viewport.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender interface is open, displaying a 3D model of a residential house (FZK-Haus).

task_completion.description: At least two access control card readers are modeled near the entrances with the IfcSecurityAppliance class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: New objects (e.g., simple cubes or cylinders) are visible near the building entrances in the 3D viewport, and the BlenderBIM outliner or object properties panel shows them assigned to the 'IfcSecurityAppliance' class.

task_completion.description: At least one CCTV camera is modeled observing an entrance with the IfcAudioVisualAppliance class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new object is positioned to observe an entrance, and the outliner or properties panel shows it assigned to the 'IfcAudioVisualAppliance' class.

task_completion.description: At least one alarm siren or bell is modeled with the IfcAlarm class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new object is visible in the 3D viewport or outliner, and the properties panel shows it assigned to the 'IfcAlarm' class.

task_completion.description: A new distribution system named 'Access Control System' or 'Security Network' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The BlenderBIM Systems, Groups, or Spatial outliner shows a system named 'Access Control System' or 'Security Network' with the class 'IfcDistributionSystem'.

task_completion.description: The security elements are assigned to the newly created distribution system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The outliner or system management panel shows the created security appliances, CCTV camera, and alarm nested under or assigned to the 'Access Control System' or 'Security Network'.

task_completion.description: The enriched project is saved as an IFC file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export IFC' dialog in Blender shows the file being saved as 'fzk_security.ifc' in '/home/ga/BIMProjects/', or a terminal/file manager confirms the file exists at this path.

integrity.description: Agent used the Blender/Bonsai GUI to model and assign IFC classes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Blender's 3D viewport, outliner, and BlenderBIM properties panels, rather than just writing a script in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not just create a dummy file or empty IFC file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final saved file is exported from Blender after the modeling steps, rather than being created via terminal commands like 'touch' or a basic text editor.

integrity.description: The system assignment was done within the BIM software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The assignment of elements to the distribution system is visible in the BlenderBIM interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_security.ifc'. The required IFC classes are 'IfcSecurityAppliance' (at least 2), 'IfcAudioVisualAppliance' (at least 1), 'IfcAlarm' (at least 1), and 'IfcDistributionSystem' (named 'Access Control System' or 'Security Network').
